Description: Unique ID generated to track each site inspection report.
Links this damage report directly to a specific project site location.
The unique asset identifier for the specific wind turbine inspected.
The exact model version of the wind turbine asset.
Descriptive type of structural issue found (e.g., 45° cracking, grout debonding, or tilt).
Approximate measured physical length or area of the crack or defect.
Numeric rating baseline indicating urgency of repair (e.g., scale from 1 to 5).
Detailed engineering description of the recommended repair steps or material fix.
Unique ID generated to track each quality log entry.
Links the quality log entry back to the specific construction project site.
The technical stage checked on-site (e.g., Excavation, Chipping, Concrete Pour).
Calendar date when the field inspection task was officially conducted.
Compressive strength measured in MegaPascals (MPa) from lab crushing tests.
Unique ID generated to track each client.
The legal corporate name of the client (like ReNew or Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills).
The official head office address for tax filing.
The client's 15-digit registration code for government goods and services tax tracking.
Legal 10-digit income tax permanent account number.
Unique code assigned to a specific construction site.
Connects the site back to the owner in the Clients table.
Name of the build (e.g., Shahuwadi WTG Foundation or Kudligi Shed).
Specific area or farm identifier where the team is working.
The state where the site is based (e.g., Maharashtra, Karnataka, Gujarat).
Differentiates between building a Shed, a new Foundation, or doing a Grouting Repair.
Calendar date when work officially kicked off on site.
The contractually agreed-upon target completion date.
System ID for tracking this specific execution agreement.
The actual official document number typed on the physical contract paperwork.
Links the agreement to a specific construction location.
Date when the contract was formally signed and awarded.
Total money awarded for the scope before adding government taxes.
Text summary of milestones (like 40% advance stage or 5% retention).
Unique marker for an individual operational task line item.
Ties this specific engineering requirement back to the main contract.
Technical shorthand referencing the task number (e.g., Item 2.1 or Section 4).
Clear text describing what the site engineer must do (like Pedestal Demolition or PCC).
Engineering metric used for tracking volume or area (e.g., Cu.m, Sq.m, MT, or LS).
The target quantity calculated during estimation before digging starts.
The specific fixed cost charged per individual unit of work.
Calculated field multiplying standard estimated quantity by unit rate.
Standard 6-digit Service Accounting Code required for mapping service taxes under Indian law.
Measured speed from non-destructive tests evaluating internal concrete density.
Final checklist sign-off evaluation status (e.g., Pass or Fail).
Unique identifier code used to track each external vendor.
The legal company name of the material manufacturer or lab supplier.
The internal supplier shorthand code registered in company systems.
The vendor's official 15-digit tax registration profile code.
Classification tracking the vendor's domain (e.g., Material Supplier, Testing Lab, Subcontractor).
Unique ID code generated to track each engineering material master file.
Structural name of the material product (e.g., Conbextra BB92-O, Nitowrap FRC).
Industrial group making the component (e.g., Fosroc, Sika India).
Notes on technical density, viscosity, or target structural usage from data sheets.
Manufacturer recommended yield metric (e.g., square meters per liter or per bag).
System baseline tracker code generated for this specific order record.
The legal document sequence code typed on the procurement form.
Maps the material supply orders back to the construction site location.
Maps the transactional order items back to the target supplier profile.
Calendar date when the purchase order authorization form was finalized.
Total baseline purchase financial balance tracking before external taxes.
Target material logistics expected arrival cut-off tracking date.
System tracker key used to capture advance vendor payment requests.
The literal pre-billing invoice document reference number.
Relates this advance deposit request back to an active Purchase Order.
Calendar invoice entry point date documenting the advance fund request.
Exact value matching specific upstream deposit step rules (e.g., 50% down payment).
Estimated proportional goods and services tax breakdown layer value.
Sum total including base balances and calculated tax obligations.
Internal accounting token code tracking legal milestone billing events.
Legal alphanumeric serial identifier required for official corporate audit runs.
Legal date of document filing used to establish official GST tax point reporting.
Relates the outgoing project claim back to the original client master contract.
Exact contract budget stage increment mapped (e.g., 40.00% or 60.00%).
Net baseline service valuation level total completely stripped of tax layers.
Proportional Central Goods and Services Tax ledger allocation amount.
Proportional State Goods and Services Tax ledger allocation amount.
Proportional Integrated Goods and Services Tax allocation used across state boundaries.
Gross client financial funding obligation balance total due for collection.
System token identifier registering an accepted field completion event.
The document sequence text tracking engineering field authorization forms.
Connects field validation clear points back to the contract profile.
Official tracked entry date when crew deployment kicked off physically on site.
Calendar verification point showing task phase handoff completion timing.
On-site engineering verified task total counts matching actual output metrics.
Status flag noting whether out-of-scope adjustments occurred during production (True/False).
